use rayon::prelude::*;

// BAD: unwrap/expect in parallel closures can abort entire batch
fn scan_files(paths: &[PathBuf]) -> Vec<ScanResult> {
    paths.par_iter()
        .map(|path| {
            let content = std::fs::read_to_string(path).unwrap();
            let parsed = serde_json::from_str::<Document>(&content).unwrap();
            scan_document(&parsed)
        })
        .collect()
}

fn process_items(items: &[Item]) -> Vec<Output> {
    items.par_iter()
        .map(|item| {
            let value = item.parse_value().expect("invalid value format");
            transform(value)
        })
        .collect()
}
